__________ HOW TO USE THIS FILE ________: Change any number after the colon on each line.
Do NOT change the names on the left side.
Lines starting with __ are just descriptions - ignore them.
Save the file, then go to Actions tab and click Run Workflow.
__ SIMULATION LENGTH __: How far into the future to model
__ MONTE CARLO RUNS __: How many random simulations to run
__ monthly_income tip: Combined take-home pay for both people after taxes
__ starting_cash tip: Total savings available at wedding date (Nov 2026)
__ trailer_fixup_cost tip: One-time cost to make trailer livable
__ trailer_monthly_fixed tip: Monthly living expenses in trailer (not counting gas or repairs)
__ trailer_gas tip: Monthly gas in trailer phase (long commute, 2 cars)
__ a_moveout_month tip: Month they leave trailer and buy permanent home (24 = 2 years)
__ a_house_price tip: Purchase price of Option A permanent home
__ a_house_repair_cap tip: Most repairs can cost in a single month
__ b_house1_gas tip: Shorter commute while living in House 1
__ b_moveout_month tip: Month they move out and House 1 becomes a rental (36 = 3 years)
__ b_vacancy_rate_pct tip: Percent of months the rental sits empty
__ b_house2_down_pct tip: Higher down payment possible thanks to rental income savings
__ passive_income_goal tip: Monthly passive income target - sim tracks when Option B hits this
__ hourly_time_value tip: What an hour of your time is worth in dollars
__ extra_commute_hrs_per_month tip: Extra hours per month commuting in Option A vs Option B
__ annual_appreciation_pct tip: How much homes gain in value per year
__ annual_inflation_pct tip: How much everyday costs rise per year
__ gas_volatility_pct tip: How much gas prices randomly swing each month
